TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sinkam, title = Sinkam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sinkam} }

S.FORM: alang Sinkam ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 431 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 379 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 52 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Amis 4%, Puyuma 0.5%, saySiyat 0.5%, Truku 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga Nakahila. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga Panital. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sinkam ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Sinkam maku 1 hasisyo. khu skwan biru qalang Sinkam maki 1 skwan biru. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sinkam ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 431 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 379 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 52 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Amis 4%, Puyuma 0.5%, saySiyat 0.5%, Truku 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga Nakahila. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga Panital. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sinkam ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Sinkam maku 1 hasisyo. khu skwan biru qalang Sinkam maki 1 skwan biru. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēinkam …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu zos~…ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, pujuma *.*%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *.*%, truku *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēinkam ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēinkam ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēinkam ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēinkam ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēinkam ńßja Ē …£a nakańßila. taj Ēzil na s~…ēinkam ńßja Ē …£a panital. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč s~…ēinkam …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo qalaŇč s~…ēinkam maku * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru qalaŇč s~…ēinkam maki * s~…ēkwan ő≤iru. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
